scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,intake,faq,mail -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "npm --workspace @agentsox/web run dev" "npm --workspace @agentsox/intake-worker run dev" "npm --workspace @agentsox/faq-worker run dev" "npm --workspace @agentsox/mail-worker run dev"
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @agentsox/intake-worker run typecheck && npm --workspace @agentsox/faq-worker run typecheck && npm --workspace @agentsox/mail-worker run typecheck
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run typecheck
